Off Calendar Sep-30-2014 Off Calendar

Petition For Instructions (Probate Code Section 17200(A); (B)(1)(3)(4)(6) And (10)
Off Calendar Jun-09-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Henry Froneberger and Basil Plastiras for and with Patricia Amster. James Mitchell for Mechanics Bank. Richard Franceschini for Jennifer Daneman. Ernest Der for Wells Fargo Bank.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the issue of notice/proof of service, whether or not this is a contest to the Trust, whether all documents have been provided, etc. The Petition for Instructions was taken under submission. Counsel are to submit proposed orders.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For Instructions (Probate Code Section 17200(A); (B)(1)(3)(4)(6) And (10)
Off Calendar Mar-24-2014 Continued To May-19-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Henry Froneberger and Sylvia Shapiro for and with Patricia Amster. Richard Franceschini for Jennifer Daneman. Seth Skootksy for Wells Fargo Bank (Trustee).

Mr. Franceschini stated that his Client is the Mother of the three Children, that he believes she is already appointed under Washington law and that there is no need for a Guardian Ad Litem. Mr. Skootksy stated that Wells Fargo is only the Trustee of the Sub-Trust, that Mechanics Bank is the Trustee of the Parents' Trust, that Mechanics Bank has not been given notice, that the terms are different and that he prefers to have Mechanics Bank weigh in. Mr. Froneberger stated that it was their understanding that Mechanics Bank was no longer involved after Ms. Davis' death. The Petition for Instructions was continued to May 19, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Any additional responses are due by May 5, 2014.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Leonardini. (Not Reported)
